parameters.content:
## 📥 INPUT HANDLING
Validation, sanitization, duplicate detection

## 🔗 URL EXTRACTION
Fetch and extract content from URLs with fallback

## 🤖 DRAFT GENERATION
Sequential AI generation with inter-draft context for angle diversity

## 💾 STATE MANAGEMENT
Persist drafts to Supabase and return to frontend
